topic: Menopause: the 7 stages most doctors don't explain
caption: Did you know menopause has 7 distinct stages? 🌟 Most doctors only discuss the basics, but we're here to break it down for you. 💡 From perimenopause to postmenopause, each stage brings its own set of challenges and opportunities. 🌿 Learn how to navigate this journey with confidence. 💪 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future self will thank you. 🙏 #menopause #womenshealth #hormones
